# OpenCode Coding Handoff Skill

Use when launching OpenCode for coding work.

Rules:
- Confirm workspace path and task scope before launch.
- Keep shell and filesystem access scoped to the selected workspace.
- Require commands run, changed files, tests, and residual risks in the return artifact.
- Use provider routing agreed by the user, not add-on-owned routing.
- Run deterministic verification before task completion where available.
